---
name: Docs / website issue
about: A problem with the docs, download page, or website
title: "[Docs] "
labels: ["documentation", "needs-triage"]
---

**Where is the problem?**
Link to the page or section.

**What's wrong?**
- [ ] Typo / grammar
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other (describe)

**Suggested fix**
What the correct content should be, if you know.
